Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Continued To Feb-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Court Approval Of Creditor Claims
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dan Cooperider appeared by telephone for Michael Carico.

The Court stated that it is having trouble understanding how a creditor's claim in this Estate is going to address the issue of what the Trustee did in the Trust administration. Mr. Cooperider stated that there really is no dispute regarding title, that they are talking about breach of duties, that they are seeking monetary damages for what should have been done and that the residual beneficiary's interests will be harmed. The Court stated that they need to get the Trust funded, that there is no true creditor's claim in the Decedent's estate, that this petition makes no sense and that the parties need to rethink about how they are going to fix this. The Petition for Court Approval of Creditor's Claims is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
